news.content_en: Every booster box opened, every seat pulled up to a table at a local game store, every event attended with friends old and new. These are the moments that make Sorcery what it is, and Dust is our way of saying thank you to the players and stores who make them possible. A loyalty system for all types of Sorcery fans, Dust allows players to unlock exclusive promos, playmats, and more simply by participating in events on the Sorcery Play Network and by opening and authenticating booster boxes. Dust can be acquired primarily in two ways. Every Sorcery booster box includes a unique scratch-off code on the bottom. Scan the QR code or visit sorcerytcg.com/authenticate to enter your code, verify your product's authenticity, and unlock a grant of Dust. In addition to being acquirable through purchased products, Dust can also be earned through participation in in-person events hosted through the Sorcery Play Network. The program is built to celebrate local play: the joy of gathering at your game store, meeting fellow Sorcerers, and sharing the game face-to-face. Participation Dust is capped monthly, so you can enjoy the game at your own pace without feeling the need to grind. The monthly cap of Dust for participation is 250. In addition to being acquirable through purchased products, Dust can be earned through participation and achievement in events on the Sorcery Play Network. Participating in learn-to-play events, casual meetups, and tournaments will unlock Dust rewards, while additi
news.summary_pt: A nova atualização 'Poeira' em Sorcery TCG introduz um sistema de fidelidade que recompensa jogadores e lojas por sua participação. Ao abrir caixas de booster e participar de eventos no Sorcery Play Network, os jogadores podem desbloquear promoções exclusivas e prêmios. O programa celebra a interação local, incentivando encontros e torneios entre fãs do jogo.

news.title_en: Thank You for Contesting the Realm With Us This Year
news.content_en: As the year draws to a close, we wanted to pause, just for a moment, and say thank you. Sorcery: Contested Realm has always been more than cards on a table. It’s a conversation across playmats, hand-crafted art, first games and fiftieth games, Rolling Boulders returning, and the quiet joy of discovering something strange and beautiful together. As the months passed, those moments became something we all returned to again and again. Throughout the year, you continued to show up for the realm and for one another. You shared tables, taught games, answered questions, and made space for others to join in. That generosity of spirit is what defined Sorcery in 2025. This year, we saw the realm expand in meaningful ways, sometimes loudly with dragons and demons, and sometimes quietly around the kitchen table. The launch of Gothic and Ed Beard Jr.’s Dragonlord Mini Set marked new chapters for the realm, introducing new themes and ideas while maintaining the same commitment to hand-crafted artistry that defines Sorcery. We welcomed a tremendous number of new players discovering the realm for the very first time and gathered at events both big and small, from community gatherings and Sorcery Organized Play events to major convention appearances at Gen Con, PAX Australia, and alongside our new partners at Star City Games through SCG CON. Wherever Sorcerers gathered, it was in continued celebration of what makes Sorcery distinct: hand-painted art, deliberate pacing, narrative-rich gameplay
news.title_pt: Obrigado por Competir no Reino Conosco Este Ano
news.summary_pt: À medida que o ano chega ao fim, a equipe de Sorcery: Contested Realm agradece aos jogadores por sua participação e apoio. O jogo se destacou por momentos de conexão, arte artesanal e novas experiências, com o lançamento de novas expansões e eventos que reuniram a comunidade. A generosidade e o espírito colaborativo definiram 2025 para todos nós.

news.title_en: The Realm Opens in Melbourne at Pax Australia
news.content_en: PAX Australia is officially underway! Join us at the Melbourne Convention & Exhibition Centre as Erik's Curiosa takes its place at PAX Australia 2025! Whether you're here to play, collect, or simply immerse yourself in hand-painted fantasy, our booth #TT2828 is your portal into the realm of all things Sorcery: Contested Realm! We've partnered with All Interactive Distribution (AIE) to bring the realm to life at PAX Aus this year! At the booth you'll find: If you're attending, we'd love to see your photos and stories from the show floor! Share your moments on social media using #contestedrealm, tag us on socials, or share in our Discord and Facebook communities. Not in Melbourne? Stay tuned to our channels all weekend long for updates from PAX Australia 2025! See you at Booth #TT2828! Grand Contests bring together players from across regions for Sorcery's largest competitive and community celebrations. Here's what you need to know. Cornerstone Championsihps celebrate the communities you've built, and invite the realm to join you. © 2024 by Erik's Curiosa Limited. All Rights Reserved.
news.title_pt: O Reino Abre em Melbourne na PAX Austrália
news.summary_pt: A PAX Austrália já começou! Visite nosso estande #TT2828 no Melbourne Convention & Exhibition Centre e mergulhe no mundo de Sorcery: Contested Realm. Compartilhe suas fotos e histórias usando #contestedrealm e fique ligado para atualizações durante todo o fim de semana!

news.title_en: Darkness Descends: The Gothic Trailer Revealed
news.content_en: Darker forces shroud the realm, but the darkness lifts as we herald the forthcoming launch of Sorcery: Contested Realm’s hotly anticipated second expansion: Gothic. The official Gothic trailer has premiered exclusively on TCGplayer’s YouTube Channel. Get your first glimpse at the horrors soon to arrive in the realm! Grand Contests bring together players from across regions for Sorcery's largest competitive and community celebrations. Here's what you need to know. Cornerstone Championsihps celebrate the communities you've built, and invite the realm to join you. © 2024 by Erik's Curiosa Limited. All Rights Reserved.
news.title_pt: A Escuridão Desce: O Trailer Gótico Revelado
news.summary_pt: Forças sombrias envolvem o reino, mas a escuridão se dissipa com o anúncio da tão aguardada segunda expansão de Sorcery: Contested Realm, chamada Gothic. O trailer oficial foi lançado exclusivamente no canal do TCGplayer no YouTube, oferecendo um primeiro vislumbre dos horrores que estão por vir. Os Grand Contests reúnem jogadores de diversas regiões para as maiores celebrações competitivas e comunitárias do jogo.

news.title_en: PAX Australia Guest Artist: Brian Smith Joins the Sorcery Booth
news.content_en: Erik’s Curiosa is excited to be making its first appearance at PAX Australia this October, and we’ve partnered with All Interactive Distribution (AIE) to bring an expanded booth to PAX Aus, complete with learn-to-play demos, artist card signings, and an unforgettable showcase of traditional fantasy art. “We’re excited to be partnering with Erik’s Curiosa at PAX Aus to showcase the incredible gameplay of Sorcery: Contested Realm,” says Aimee Lowe, Accounts Manager at AIE. “Leveraging All Interactive Distribution’s reach and logistics expertise across Australia and New Zealand, this collaboration sets the stage for the highly anticipated Gothic set launching later this year.” As part of the celebration, we’re proud to announce that Brian Smith, one of the most prolific artists behind Gothic, will be joining us at the Sorcery booth! Known for his bold, surreal depictions of the mystical and monstrous, Brian’s work captures the darker tone and haunting atmosphere that define the upcoming set. At the show, he’ll be signing cards, showcasing original pieces from Gothic, and connecting with fans all weekend long. With iconic pieces found within Sorcery’s Alpha and Beta sets, Brian marks his return to Sorcery with his latest work:  Returned King. We’re thrilled to offer fans, both new and old, the chance to meet Brian at the Sorcery booth at Pax Australia, where he’ll be signing cards, selling prints, and showcasing original artwork from our forthcoming set, Gothic. Don’t miss your c
news.title_pt: Artista Convidado da PAX Australia: Brian Smith se Junta ao Estande de Sorcery
news.summary_pt: A Erik's Curiosa fará sua primeira aparição na PAX Australia em outubro, em parceria com a All Interactive Distribution. O estande contará com demonstrações de jogo, autógrafos de cartas e uma exibição de arte fantástica. Brian Smith, artista renomado do set Gothic, estará presente para autografar cartas e interagir com os fãs.

news.title_en: Join the Contest: Sorcery: Contested Realm at Gen Con 2025
news.content_en: Mark your calendars for July 31 - August 3 and set your waypoint portals to Indianapolis. With over 71,000 people in attendance last year, we were humbled by the overwhelming reception at our booth, and we can’t wait to share in the experience with you again. If you are new to Gen Con, let us just say - it’s an absolute blast. Picture tens of thousands of gamers, collectors, and creators all in one place, coming together to celebrate what we love most: games, community, and fun. For those that have participated in Sorcery events at Gen Con in the past, you know exactly what we are talking about - but if you haven’t had the honor of attending, it’s an experience not to be missed. Last year, you blew the Erik’s Curiosa team away. We had sold-out learn-to-play events, packed tournaments, and a stream of unforgettable moments. We can’t wait to do it all again this year! We’re still fine-tuning the details, so keep an eye out for more updates as the year progresses, but, as always, we're committed to making this an incredible event! Trust us - you’re not going to want to miss what we’ve got planned! Join the conversation in our dedicated #gencon channel on the  Sorcery: Contested Realm Discord Server or in the Sorcery: Contested Realm Facebook group. We look forward to seeing you at Gen Con! Grand Contests bring together players from across regions for Sorcery's largest competitive and community celebrations. Here's what you need to know. Cornerstone Championsihps celebrate the co
news.title_pt: Participe do Concurso: Sorcery: Contested Realm na Gen Con 2025
news.summary_pt: Marque no seu calendário de 31 de julho a 3 de agosto e prepare-se para Indianapolis! A Gen Con é uma celebração incrível de jogos, comunidade e diversão, reunindo milhares de jogadores e criadores. Não perca a chance de vivenciar momentos inesquecíveis com a equipe de Sorcery e outros entusiastas!

news.title_en: Landmark Sorcery event for Italy at Magic Maze, October 27th 2024
news.content_en: Arthurian Legends is only 2 weeks away and, in addition to launch events around the world, communities have already begun to announce tent-pole events to celebrate the release of the latest set for Sorcery: Contested Realm! In Prato, Italy, the Sorcery community at the Magic Maze game store looks to make their mark and share their long-time enthusiasm for Sorcery: Contested Realm with a landmark event for the region - a 48-player event. “We’re thrilled to be organizing this event,” shares Magic Maze owner Federico. “Our passion for Sorcery TCG and its vibrant community inspired us to create a space where fans could come together, share their love for the game, and experience its magic firsthand.” Sorcerers in the region are certainly in for a treat! Not only is the event being hosted by one of Italy's largest Sorcery communities, but participants will also have the unique opportunity to meet renowned Sorcery artists Andrea Modesti and Francesca Baerald. With a special area dedicated to signatures and showcasing artwork, this event promises an immersive Sorcery experience. “What excites us the most is the chance to bring the community together like never before,” Federico continues. “Seeing players engage with each other, discover new strategies, and build lasting friendships around Sorcery TCG is what truly makes this event special.” With high expectations for the competition and a memorable day planned for all attendees, this event will be streamed on the SorceryTCG Italia Y
news.title_pt: Evento Landmark de Sorcery na Itália no Magic Maze, 27 de outubro de 2024
news.summary_pt: Faltando apenas 2 semanas para o lançamento de Arthurian Legends, a comunidade de Sorcery em Prato, Itália, está se preparando para um evento marcante com 48 jogadores. O proprietário do Magic Maze, Federico, destaca a paixão pela comunidade e a presença de artistas renomados, prometendo uma experiência imersiva e a oportunidade de fortalecer laços entre os fãs do jogo.

news.title_en: How to Play the Battlemage and the "Shrink the Frog" Deck
news.content_en: One of my favorite things about Sorcery is how it brings back that old-school love of trading card games that so many of us share with innovative, modern play experience. Sure, Sorcery's amazing art might grab your attention first, but it’s the way the art pairs with awesome gameplay that keeps things exciting. Plus, the stories that come out of playing are unforgettable and make every game a fun experience you share with your opponent. Ask someone how their last game of Sorcery went, and you'll likely get a story: “The King of the Realm got turned into a frog, but then he rolled a boulder over his enemies for revenge!” Coupled with the Avatar being your embodiment in the Realm, there’s even more potential for putting yourself into action. The Battlemage is a fan favorite among folks who like to bring the fight to their opponent. I had the privilege to catch up with community member Alexis Romero (aka Count Tolstoy on the Sorcery Discord) to talk about what initially drew them into the Sorcery community as well as how they run their “Shrink the Frog” Deck - a Battlemage Deck you can bust out at your next casual play meet-up with friends! Alexis: I have enjoyed TCGs ever since I was a child, and my older brother was as much an avid fan as I was. The spark of enjoyment sort of fizzled out though as the years went by, since it became less about the game itself and more about how valuable certain cards were. I would occasionally dip my toe back into some TCGs and win some tournam
news.title_pt: Como Jogar com o Battlemage e o Deck 'Encolha o Sapo'
news.summary_pt: Sorcery TCG resgata a paixão pelos jogos de cartas com uma experiência de jogo inovadora. A arte impressionante se combina com uma jogabilidade empolgante, criando histórias memoráveis a cada partida. O Battlemage é ideal para quem gosta de confrontos diretos, e o deck 'Encolha o Sapo' promete diversão nas jogatinas casuais com amigos.

news.title_en: Play Seer like the Champion of the Courtesan Cup
news.content_en: After months of intense competition and over thirteen store qualifiers, sorcerers gathered in Baltimore to test their skills against players from across the United States and beyond, including one who flew in from as far away as Russia! This was the community-organized Courtesan Cup and Spring Sorcery Social. With store champions from all over the country, the event posed a daunting challenge: emerge victorious from a gauntlet of veteran players to claim the Courtesan Cup. Christian Johnson rose to the challenge, achieving victory one match at a time, using the Seer to foresee his ultimate success. Christian graciously agreed to share with the community what makes his deck, Ragnarök, so particularly potent. “I think what makes this deck stand out is that it's a true combo/tempo deck. Most Roots of Yggdrasil decks go for high mana and use Roots as a panic button or just a reset that they can recover from better than their opponents, whether it's through card advantage or Bedrocks. Geomancer gets card advantage through Rubble, but Roots isn't integral to its winning strategy. Ragnarök wants Roots almost every game, aiming for it around turn 5, and then uses Roots to drop a threat and restrict the opponent's mana, thus limiting their removal options." You can view Christian's full deck list, "Ragnarök," on Sorcery TCG’s official deck-building site Curiosa.io here. Christian: I started playing Seer pretty early on. I liked control styles of play, so initially, I thought I'd like
news.title_pt: Jogue de Seer como o Campeão da Courtesan Cup
news.summary_pt: Após meses de competição intensa e mais de treze qualificatórias em lojas, magos se reuniram em Baltimore para a Courtesan Cup e o Spring Sorcery Social. Christian Johnson se destacou, utilizando o Seer para conquistar a vitória, e compartilhou insights sobre seu deck, Ragnarök, que se destaca por ser um verdadeiro deck de combo/tempo.

news.content_en: This week brings news of past events and more upcoming, insight into how to play like the Unland Champion, as well as more gameplay from the Realm, and a reminder for those who missed our Arthurian Legend spoiler! Congratulations to SorceryCon event organizers David Cornwell and Alex West, as well as all the players, artists, and supporters who helped make Sorcery’s first fan-run convention a success. Here's to the SorceryCOn Unland Cup Champions, Gilbert Mederios (Constructed) and Zach Bunn (Sealed)! We caught up with Sorcery Champion Gilbert Mederios to discuss his strategy for achieving victory at SorceryCon's constructed Unland Cup event. Learn how the champion approached building the deck that helped him secure his triumph here. Best of luck to all participants in the Baltimore Courtesan Cup Qualifier this weekend as well as to those participating in Aquila Gaming’s event in Brussels, Belgium! With over 140 events on the horizon, remember you can search for events near you on the Play Sorcery Network. Be sure to note the following events: In addition, the Sorcery League, the largest community-run online league for Sorcery, is kicking off its fourth season, starting today! It has grown to an incredible 160 members — a huge thanks to Ira Fay for continuing to provide this platform. More information about how to participate in this free community league can be found here. Our latest gameplay video brings a faceoff between the Battlemage and the Enchantress. Will the auras o
news.summary_pt: Esta semana traz novidades sobre eventos passados e futuros, dicas para jogar como o Campeão Unland, além de mais jogabilidade do Reino. Parabéns aos organizadores do SorceryCon e aos campeões do Unland Cup! A Liga Sorcery inicia sua quarta temporada com 160 membros. Confira como participar dessa liga comunitária gratuita!

news.content_en: This week marks a significant milestone as we close out the year with a retrospective with Erik, Simon, and the design team, reflecting on the remarkable journey Sorcery: Contested Realm has undertaken over the past 12 months. Additionally, we offer a sneak peek into the exciting developments anticipated in 2024, courtesy of the community, featuring two major events. Simon stopped by for a visit with our friends at Cardboard Guide to talk Beta Print Run, Curiosa, and the future of Sorcery: Contested Realm for a video chat you won’t want to miss! Mark your calendars for two fantastic events coming in 2024, SorceryCon and the Australia/New Zealand Championship 2024. The Pacific Northwest Sorcery community is organizing a Sorcery convention in Seattle, Washington, February 16th-18th, 2024!  “SorceryCon” brings opportunities for free play, a constructed tournament, as well as sealed tournament play. With some of the most passionate players in the world, the Pacific Northwest’s SorcCon provides an opportunity for you to meet with other Sorcerers for both relaxed events and more competitive formats with the 17th’s Constructed Tournament being for the title of the “Unland Crown.”  Find out more about Sorcery’s largest fan-lead gathering yet! Sorcerers mark your calendars; Oceania is set to become a realm contested! On April 6th and 7th, join in for the Australia and New Zealand Championship 2024. Sorcerers from around Oceania are invited to join in for a weekend of multi-format play
news.summary_pt: Esta semana marca um marco significativo com uma retrospectiva do ano com Erik, Simon e a equipe de design, refletindo sobre a jornada notável de Sorcery: Contested Realm. Prepare-se para dois grandes eventos em 2024: SorceryCon em Seattle e o Campeonato da Austrália/Nova Zelândia. Não perca a oportunidade de se juntar a outros Sorcerers para um fim de semana de jogos emocionantes!

news.title_en: How to Play Aggro Sparkmage with Justin
news.content_en: Justin (Metroidpikmin on the Sorcery Discord) has been an active Sorcery: Contested Realm community member since Alpha playtesting and has placed in the top 8 in the Sorcery League. You can often find him answering rules in the dedicated Sorcery Discord channel - if you haven't already joined the community, head on over! This week, Justin breaks down how he plays the Sparkmage with a deck he has efficiently labeled... “Sparkmage Aggro." You can view Justin's full deck list on Sorcery’s deckbuilder here. Deck Inspiration: What inspired you to create this deck? What theme or concept behind this deck makes it stand out? I thoroughly enjoy the Sparkmage ability. Upon first reading it, I found it incredibly cool, and I immediately envisioned going all-in with it. This deck's theme revolves around a teleporting ball of lightning, and the Sparkmage is set to play a significant role! Key Card Choices: Tell us about some of the key cards in your deck and why you included them. How do they synergize with your deck's strategy? The Teleports play a crucial role as the deck’s victory hinges on the Sparkmage. It’s vital to position the Sparkmage close without tapping, so they can their ability. But let’s be clear - Kythera Mechanism stands out as the deck’s top card. Sparkmage, Lightning Bolt, Thunderstorm, Headless Haunt, and Raise Dead all share the word random. Mechanism puts in a lot of work, letting you hit what you want to hit. There are several other notable cards, Poisonous Dagger
news.title_pt: Como Jogar Aggro Sparkmage com Justin
news.summary_pt: Justin, membro ativo da comunidade Sorcery: Contested Realm, compartilha sua abordagem para jogar com o Sparkmage em um deck que ele chamou de 'Sparkmage Aggro'. Ele destaca a importância da habilidade do Sparkmage e a sinergia entre cartas-chave como Kythera Mechanism e Teleports, que são essenciais para a estratégia do deck.

news.title_en: GAMEPLAY: New Elemental Avatars of Sorcery Contested Realm in ACTION!
news.content_en: With Sorcery: Contested Realm we set out to create more than a card game, we wanted to craft an experience.  With fantastic art and gameplay, we seek to transport you into the Contested Realm. The latest four Elemental Avatars available in the Beta Preconstructed Decks are an extension of that desire. These Avatars represent masters of fundamental forces of nature, each with unique strengths and abilities. Taking on the persona of an Avatar of the Realm, whether as the Geomancer, Sparkmage, Waveshaper, or Flamecaller, we want you to be drawn into the fantastical realm of Sorcery. With the reveal of the Avatars later today, you will begin to have a sense of the potential these new Avatars bring to the game... but to really have an understanding you'll want to see them in action! Avatars in Action: Sorcery Team Covenant Gameplay We know you’ve been eagerly waiting to see the gameplay of Beta Edition Elemental Avatars in action, and the time has come! Today, at 2:30 PM EST, join us for a showcase with Team Covenant pitting the Geomancer and the Sparkmage in a head-to-head showdown. Steven and Zach capture the spirit of the Sorcery gameplay experience and couple this with unparalleled production quality for a gameplay video you won't want to miss! With so many possibilities unlocked by the addition of the Elemental Avatars in the Beta Preconstructed Decks, you might be wondering how the Geomancer plays against other Preconstructed Avatars. Well, don't worry! If you are looking fo
news.title_pt: GAMEPLAY: Novos Avatares Elementais de Sorcery: Contested Realm em AÇÃO!
news.summary_pt: Em Sorcery: Contested Realm, buscamos criar mais do que um simples jogo de cartas, mas uma experiência imersiva. Os novos Avatares Elementais, como o Geomante e o Sparkmage, trazem forças da natureza com habilidades únicas. Não perca a demonstração de gameplay com a equipe Covenant hoje às 14h30 EST!

news.title_en: Track Your Collection with the New Printable PDF Collection Checklist!
news.content_en: For veterans of trading card games, the thrill of building a complete collection of cards is a familiar and exhilarating journey. However, as your collection grows through trades and acquisitions, it can quickly become a daunting task to keep track of which cards you already possess. But fear not! We have an exciting solution that combines the convenience of modern technology with a touch of old-school charm. Introducing the latest feature from Curiosa.io—a printable PDF Alpha Sorcery: Contested Realm collection checklist! As part of the recent Curiosa.io update, the printable PDF collection tracker is now available for Sorcery: Contested Realm enthusiasts. Whether you prefer the standard A4 size or the US Letter size, we have you covered! Grand Contests bring together players from across regions for Sorcery's largest competitive and community celebrations. Here's what you need to know. Cornerstone Championsihps celebrate the communities you've built, and invite the realm to join you. © 2024 by Erik's Curiosa Limited. All Rights Reserved.
news.title_pt: Acompanhe sua Coleção com o Novo Checklist de Coleção em PDF para Impressão!
news.summary_pt: Para os veteranos de jogos de cartas colecionáveis, completar uma coleção é uma jornada emocionante. Com o novo checklist em PDF da Curiosa.io, você pode facilmente rastrear suas cartas de Sorcery: Contested Realm. Disponível em tamanhos A4 e Carta dos EUA, essa ferramenta combina tecnologia moderna com um toque clássico para facilitar sua experiência de colecionador.

news.content_en: So last week we got the first box of boosters from the factory. We were faced with the dilemma of saving them to open closer to fulfillment where we could do so with a bit of ceremony and reverence, or tear into a booster box right then, like the ravenous gamers we know we are at our core. We chose... poorly... Grand Contests bring together players from across regions for Sorcery's largest competitive and community celebrations. Here's what you need to know. Cornerstone Championsihps celebrate the communities you've built, and invite the realm to join you. © 2024 by Erik's Curiosa Limited. All Rights Reserved.
news.title_pt: Equipe da EC Falha no Teste do Marshmallow
news.summary_pt: Na semana passada, recebemos a primeira caixa de boosters da fábrica e enfrentamos o dilema de abrir imediatamente ou guardar para um momento mais cerimonial. Optamos pela segunda opção, mas a tentação foi grande. Os Grand Contests reúnem jogadores de diversas regiões para celebrar a comunidade e a competição em Sorcery.
